productDisplayName: Timberland Men's Boat Caramel Light Brown Shoe
description: These boat shoes from timberland are understated and looks perfect for everyday casual wear. Team this with jeans or chinos and shirts for a laidback look. These shoes are created with the environment in mind in such a manner that 90% of it's parts can be recycled or reused.Upper Premium full grain leather uppers for comfort and durability Unlined uppers make it versatile to be worn even in warmer weather 100% organic cotton laces Midsole Removable Anti-fatigue footbed for all day comfort and support Outsole Siped Green Rubber outsole made from 42% recycled leather for greater slip resistance Wash careUse the appropriate timberland leather shoe polish to keep your shoes cleanDo not use polish over canvas/woven areas
